label: neither
rationale: Defending Bukusus against stereotypes: 'Bukusus are among the most educated' - rebuttal, not attack.

label: neither
rationale: Ethnic-bloc political analysis: 'Kalenjins are dividing faster than Ruto is succeeding' - coalition dynamics, no contempt.

label: offensive
rationale: Personal insult to individual: 'gakunia like u' - crude name-calling, no group attack.

label: hate
rationale: 'uncivilized luo community' - collective ethnic contempt under NCIC standard, no violence needed.

label: hate
rationale: 'Argentina is the most racist country ... killed all natives & blacks' - collective condemnation of national-origin group.

label: neither
rationale: Reporting political violence: 'MP Zaheer goons destroyed vehicles and beat up Kenyans' - documenting acts by politician's operatives.

label: neither
rationale: Political score-settling rhetoric: 'Kikuyus will do nothing. Payback time' - references 2007 power struggle, not ethnic attack.

label: offensive
rationale: Unintelligible mixed-language insult: 'abelungu wena sgora' - appears crude but target unclear.

label: neither
rationale: Political criticism and ethnic-bloc analysis: 'UDA bribe voters ... Luos won't give us rest' - commentary on campaign tactics and political activism.

label: hate
rationale: 'Hatukuangi roho chafu kama nyinyi' (we don't have dirty souls like you) - collective moral defect attributed to group.

label: hate
rationale: 'Kawaida ya waluhya they'll never unite ata yesu akirudi' - immutable negative trait assigned collectively to Luhyas.

label: offensive
rationale: 'Samia ... ni takataka' - calling Tanzanian president trash, crude personal insult not group-based.

label: neither
rationale: Electoral analysis and conspiracy theory: 'Ruto aliiba kura, wakikuyu hawakumpigia' - vote-rigging accusation, not ethnic attack.

label: offensive
rationale: 'kikuyu party ... just conmen' - attacking party operatives/politicians, not Kikuyu community as group.

label: neither
rationale: Self-directed criticism: 'how stupid my tribesmen get' - Kamba person critiquing own community's voting, no outgroup attack.

label: offensive
rationale: 'useme sifuna ni umbwa' (or say Sifuna is a dog) - personal insult to individual politician.

label: neither
rationale: 'Wakabila mtalia' (tribalists will cry) - condemning tribalism as behavior, not attacking an ethnic group.

label: neither
rationale: 'Gachagua is a tribal bigot' - harsh criticism of individual politician's behavior.

label: neither
rationale: 'Watu wa Ol Kalou wamejaa ngori kama waMeru' - reporting goons were beaten, comparing toughness (not derogatory).

rationale: 'Islam is here to conquer ... true Trojan Horse. The true danger' - religious community framed as infiltrating threat.

rationale: 'Mafala nyinyi' (you fools) - generic insult at institution, no protected characteristic.

rationale: 'Bungoma Bukusus ... very easy to manipulate. Hawajielewi' - collective defect attributed to Bukusus under NCIC standard.

rationale: Accusing named politicians of violence: 'Murkomen is busy killing my People ... Wanga, Mbadi & Omollo would rather have you Dead' - targeting specific leaders' alleged actions.

rationale: 'Ka we SI Sifuna, we ni cherargei' - political comparison/banter between politicians, no attack.
